non_negotiable_boundaries: Never target any person or group based on religion, sect, ethnicity, family name, region, tribe, or community as a whole.
No harassment, threats, violence, forced displacement, or hate speech.
Never accuse whole communities or minorities as a whole.
Document ONLY named individuals, organizations, military/security units, officials, or entities where credible public evidence exists, tied to specific conduct — not identity.
Every published claim must cite a reliable source. No source, no publication.
Boycott and social pressure are exercised only within the limits of the law.
The campaign targets the Alawites as the nurturing environment of the former regime, not as a religious sect in itself.
code_of_conduct: Evidence over allegation — no claim without a verifiable public source.
Individuals and entities only — never a community, sect, ethnicity, family, region, or tribe as a whole.
Conduct, not identity — document what someone is credibly alleged to have done, with sources.
Boycott and social pressure within the law — no calls to violence, threats, or illegal acts.
Accurate framing — use alleged / credibly implicated / under investigation / convicted exactly as the evidence supports.
Right of reply and correction — named parties may respond; corrections are honored promptly.
Privacy of the innocent — family members, children, and uninvolved associates are never published as targets.
No vigilantism — support lawful channels only; never publish home addresses or anything enabling physical targeting.

anti_discrimination_policy.unit_of_documentation: the named individual or entity — never a demographic category
publishable_offenses: referencing a person's sect, religion, ethnicity, tribe, region, or family as the sole basis of inclusion
implying guilt-by-association, guilt-by-origin, or collective responsibility for entire communities
anti_discrimination_policy.taxonomy_rule: Tags are conduct- and role-based only (e.g. command responsibility, detention facility, UN-documented, former regime affiliate). Identity-based tags cannot be entered as sole classification.
anti_discrimination_policy.note: The campaign distinguishes between targeting the Alawites as the nurturing environment of the former regime (political stance) and targeting them as a religious sect (prohibited).
